name: reschedule-dates
description: A promise whose spoken due date changes mid-call (Wednesday, then corrected to Thursday). Expect ONE task carrying the corrected date — not two tasks, not the superseded date.

dialogue.content: Hi Jordan, it's Pat from Lakeside Realty, returning your call about the inspection report.
Thanks Pat. When can I see it?
I'll send you the inspection report Wednesday.
Hmm, I'm traveling Wednesday. Could it wait a day?
Sure, actually let's make it Thursday then. I'll send the inspection report Thursday afternoon.

expect.quote_contains: send the inspection report Thursday afternoon
